title: It is not until... that + S + V

formulas.formula: It is not until + 時間/事件 + that + S + V (肯定動詞)
Not until + 時間/事件 + 助動詞 + S + V（倒裝句型）

explanation: 此句型為強調句（cleft sentence）的變體，用來強調「直到某個時間點或事件發生後，某動作才開始」。原句型為「S + do/does/did + not + V + until...」，改寫為「It is not until... that...」後，that 子句中的動詞使用肯定形式，不可再加 not。此句型常見於書面語及學測翻譯題，需特別注意 that 子句不用否定，以及時態須與語境一致。另可改寫為 Not until 開頭的倒裝句，此時主要子句須倒裝。

examples.eng: It was not until I lost my health that I realized the importance of exercise.
examples.chi: 直到我失去健康，我才意識到運動的重要性。

examples.eng: It was not until midnight that the rescue team finally arrived at the scene.
examples.chi: 直到午夜，救援隊才終於抵達現場。

examples.eng: It is not until you travel abroad that you truly appreciate your own culture.
examples.chi: 直到你出國旅行，你才真正懂得欣賞自己的文化。

examples.eng: It was not until the teacher explained it again that the students understood the concept.
examples.chi: 直到老師再次解釋，學生們才理解了這個概念。

extension.tip: 判斷技巧：看到「直到……才……」的中文翻譯題，先確認是否要強調時間點。若需強調，使用「It is/was not until... that...」，that 後面動詞用肯定式。若用原句還原法，可先寫出「S didn't V until...」再改寫，確保語意正確。

examples.test: ✗ It was not until he came that I didn't leave.
examples.result: → 錯誤！that 子句不可再用否定。正確：It was not until he came that I left.（直到他來了我才離開。）

examples.test: 原句：I didn't know the truth until she told me.
examples.result: → 強調改寫：It was not until she told me that I knew the truth.（直到她告訴我，我才知道真相。）

examples.test: 倒裝改寫：Not until she told me did I know the truth.
examples.result: → Not until 置於句首時，主要子句須用倒裝語序（助動詞 + 主詞 + 原形動詞）。

extension.note: 「直到才」找 not until，that 後面轉肯定，倒裝記得助動詞提前！

parts: she spoke that I recognized her as my elementary school classmate.
exercises.sentence: It was not until she spoke that I recognized her as my elementary school classmate.
exercises.translation: 直到她開口說話，我才認出她是我的國小同學。

parts: It was not until the earthquake struck
people began to prepare emergency kits.
exercises.sentence: It was not until the earthquake struck that people began to prepare emergency kits.
exercises.translation: 直到地震發生，人們才開始準備緊急避難包。

parts: college that he learned how to cook for himself.
exercises.sentence: It was not until he entered college that he learned how to cook for himself.
exercises.translation: 直到他上大學，他才學會自己做飯。

parts: I read the novel twice did I fully understand the author's message.
exercises.sentence: Not until I read the novel twice did I fully understand the author's message.
exercises.translation: 直到我讀了那本小說兩遍，我才完全理解作者的意涵。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最適當的選項完成句子，強調直到某時點才發生的事
mc_exercises.question_eng: It was not until she graduated from university that Maria _______.

options.text: did not start to pursue her dream

mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案為B。「It is not until... that」句型中，that子句的動詞必須使用肯定形式，不可再加否定。B項「pursued her dream」符合此規則。A項和D項在that子句中加入否定詞，文法錯誤；C項使用進行式，改變句意且不符合該句型用法。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 補充空格，使用強調句型表達直到某時點才開始的動作
mc_exercises.question_eng: It is not until you experience failure that you _______.

options.text: will not understand the value of success
have not understood the value of success
do not understand the value of success

mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案為A。「It is not until... that」的that子句使用肯定動詞「understand」，表達直到經歷失敗後才明白成功的價值。B、C、D項皆在that子句中使用否定形式，違反此句型的基本規則——that後必須用肯定動詞。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確選項，完成強調句型並注意時態的一致性
mc_exercises.question_eng: It was not until the evidence was presented in court that the jury _______.

options.text: had not been convinced of his innocence
has been convinced of his innocence
would not have been convinced of his innocence

mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案為A。主句用過去式「It was not until」，that子句應使用過去式「was convinced」以保持時態一致。A項同時符合時態協調與that子句必須為肯定形式的規則。B項含有否定詞；C項使用現在完成式，時態不符；D項時態過於複雜且包含否定，均不適當。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷強調句型的倒裝形式，選擇正確的句子結構
mc_exercises.question_eng: Not until the rescue team arrived _______ that all the survivors could finally leave the disaster area.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案為D。「Not until... that」為倒裝句型，主句需進行主動詞倒裝：助動詞前置，主詞後移。完整句為「Not until the rescue team arrived was it that all the survivors could finally leave.」D項「was it」正確體現倒裝結構。A項「did they realize」改變了原句意思；B項和C項未進行倒裝，違反Not until開頭的倒裝句規則。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 直到老師進教室，學生們才停止聊天。
translation_exercises.answer: It is not until the teacher entered the classroom that the students stopped chatting.
key_points: It is not until + 時間點
that 後接肯定動詞 stopped
時態一致：entered 與 stopped 皆用過去式
hints: 句型框架：It is not until [時間/事件] that [S + V肯定形式]
注意：that 子句絕不可寫成 did not stop，必須用肯定形 stopped

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 直到收到大學錄取通知，她才真正放心。
translation_exercises.answer: It is not until she received the university admission letter that she truly felt relieved.
key_points: receive 改寫為過去式 received
that 後用肯定動詞 felt
副詞 truly 修飾動詞，可置於動詞前
hints: 句型框架：It is not until [S + V過去式] that [S + V肯定過去式]；注意此處時間點本身也是過去事件
易錯：不可寫成 'did not feel relieved'，而應使用肯定的 felt relieved

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 直到父母解釋了那個決定的原因，青少年才理解他們的苦心。
translation_exercises.answer: It is not until the parents explained the reason for that decision that the teenager understood their good intentions.
key_points: 複雜名詞片語 the reason for that decision
understand 改為過去式 understood，表達理解的完成
hints: 句型框架：It is not until [S + V時態] that [S + V相同時態的肯定形式]；兩個時間點都發生在過去
易錯：that 子句不可寫成 'did not understand'；另注意 'good intentions' 的搭配用法

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 直到她在課堂上當眾發表意見失敗後，她才意識到自己需要克服公眾演講的恐懼。
translation_exercises.answer: It is not until she failed to voice her opinion in front of the class that she realized she needed to overcome her fear of public speaking.
key_points: 複雜時間點：failed to voice... 用完成式概念表達
that 子句用過去式 realized，後接 needed to 的不定詞結構
fear of public speaking 為固定搭配
hints: 句型框架：It is not until [複雜事件/時間點] that [S + V過去式 + 不定詞短語]；時間點本身可含多層信息
易錯：that 子句必須是肯定形式 'realized she needed'，不可寫成 'did not realize'；另注意 'failed to + V' 與 'needed to + V' 的不定詞用法
